title: URL Shortener system design
description: URL shortener is a website that reduces the length of your URL, in order to make the address something that's easier to remember and track. It obscures the target address and can be used to redirect to an unexpected site.

data.hint: Where would you find the original URL?
Which component equally distributes load across multiple servers?
Which component acts as a data store with fast read and write access?

requirements.title: Smooth URL redirection
requirements.description: The shortened URL's resolution should be fast and seamless.

requirements.title: Maintain URL mappings
requirements.description: The system generates unique short mappings for a destination URL, and maintains this data in servers.

title: Online File Converter like Zamzar

data.hint: What tool would add powerful capabilities to the file processing flow?

capacity_estimation_question.description:
Converted files need temporary storage in our system. The server uses an attached file system for workloads.

Assume the following:

The average file size is 1 MB.
The file store has 1 TB space.
The file store speed is 80 MBps.

Question:

How many threads should serve requests in parallel for optimal concurrency?
capacity_estimation_question.question_prompt: How many threads can be run in parallel?

requirements.title: Fast Responses
requirements.description: Ensure document access for users with minimal latency

requirements.title: Small data footprint

title: CodeForces Online Judge System Design

Which component allows you to send user submissions as events to prevent sudden spikes in system usage?

requirements.title: Asynchronous Processing

requirements.title: Storing user submissions
requirements.description: Cheap and fast read/write of code submissions.

Aadhaar is a unique ID, also known as ...

requirements.title: Export Project Files
requirements.description: Users can export project files as PDF and Image

capacity_estimation_question.description:
PDF files are stored on disk. When a user makes changes to a file, a new version is created.

You try a new approach.

1. On file write, store only the file-change operations with the base file version number.
2. On file read, perform the file-change operations over the base file, and return the result.

Assume the following:

Average PDF file size is 100Kb.
Each change operation takes 2Kb.
On average, a file has 50 change operations.

Question:

How much storage space is saved using the above algorithm?
capacity_estimation_question.question_prompt: What are the savings in storage?

requirements.title: Add and Edit Documents
requirements.description: Users can create and edit documents online

title: AWS CloudWatch Metrics and Logging
description: Amazon CloudWatch is a web service that provides real-time monitoring to Amazon's EC2 customers on their resource utilization such as CPU, disk, network and replica lag for RDS Database replicas.

data.hint: Central visual interface for monitoring metrics and logs.
Dispatches alerts based on specified system events
Economical storage solution for archiving data

requirements.title: Data Visualization
requirements.description: The system must facilitate the visualization of logs and metrics data across all servers. This should include intuitive and interactive dashboards that enable users to easily monitor and analyze data

requirements.title: Optimized Storage Strategy for Log Data
requirements.description: All logs gathered from diverse services must be stored in a manner that supports efficient querying and retrieval. For long-term storage, aged or infrequently accessed logs should be transitioned to a cost-effective and reliable storage solution. This approach ensures the economical preservation of historical data while maintaining its availability for future reference or compliance needs

requirements.title: On call alarms
requirements.description: Users may set alarms to notify engineers when there is unexpected change in business metrics or error logs

query_evaluation_question.title: Total alerts from a server
query_evaluation_question.description:
Usecase: Users want to determine how many alerts of a certain level exist for a given server, which is useful for monitoring and issue tracking.

Task: Please write an SQL query to get the following data.

Query: Get the total number of alerts from server name _N_ of alert_level _C_.

Query Format:
select columns from table where condition = _R_

Please refer to the database schema below for table and column names.

requirements.title: Owners can list properties
requirements.description: Property owners can list their spaces on the platform with house rules and booking schedules.

capacity_estimation_question.description:
Booking systems serve static data like property information using CDNs.

Assume the following:

The CDN has a replication factor of 3.
Each property has on average 10 images and 2 videos.
Videos and images are compressed to average sizes of 1 MB and 100 KB respectively.
Each CDN server has 128 GB hard disk space.

Question:

How many servers do we need to list 1 million properties?
capacity_estimation_question.question_prompt: How many servers do we need?

title: GitHub Code Search
description: GitHub is an online software development platform. It's used for storing, tracking, and collaborating on software projects. The code search tool lets developers do a substring search on repositories.

data.hint: How will we search inside files?

data.explanation: File servers offer a more cost-effective solution for storing code files when compared to the higher expenses typically associated with using traditional database systems.
data.hint: A component that can be used to store code files at scale, that is cheap compared to databases
What would be the point of entry for requests?
a

requirements.title: Asynchronous Code Indexing and Search Functionality
requirements.description: Implement a system that asynchronously indexes and updates code repositories to make them searchable, ensuring continuous, real-time data synchronization without impacting the user's search experience
